name: wayfair-eu-supplier-marketing
description: Wayfair EU Supplier Marketing analyst plugin — Wayfair Sponsored Products (WSP) analysis, supplier-facing pitch decks, MBR data handling, promo recaps (Way Day, BFCM, etc.), Castlegate/RTV reframe, 5%-of-WSC budget framework. Bundles two skills (foundation + promo) and the /wsp slash command.
